feature_descriptions.auth_fail_rate: authentication-failure responses per source over the window (brute force)
feature_descriptions.distinct_errors: distinct SQLSTATE codes per source over the window (injection fuzzing)
feature_descriptions.error_rate: ErrorResponse messages per source over the window (SQLi probing / bad syntax)
feature_descriptions.msg_type: encoded message type (Startup / Query / Auth / Error / …)
feature_descriptions.query_rate: queries per source over the window
feature_descriptions.user_entropy: Shannon entropy of the startup user name

schema_description: Suricata PostgreSQL set: message type, auth/error rates, error diversity, query shape
